economic_notes: Simpcw Resources LLP (99.99% owned) generated revenues of $107,726,588 and net income of $24,989,380. Simpcw Resources LLP holds interests in Estsek Environmental Services LLP, Tmicw-kt Cultural Services LLP, Simpcw Ledcor Limited Partnership, and River City Fibre Limited Partnership. Multi-purpose facility under construction with budget of $30,932,690, costs to date $9,386,044. Pension plan contributions of $174,953. Various accommodation and impact benefit agreements with Kinder Morgan, Trans Mountain, and Canadian Hydro Developers.
notes: Large GBE equity income of $23,944,250 from Simpcw Resources LLP dominates revenue (prior year was $72,742,731 causing very high prior year surplus). CMHC revenue of $5,925,057 in 2024 vs $68,203 in 2023 is a significant increase likely related to the multi-purpose facility project. ISC funding nearly doubled year over year ($9.15M vs $5.96M). Net financial assets are very strong at $248.5M primarily due to $182.8M investment in GBEs. Buildings under construction of $9.4M relates to multi-purpose facility. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + FNHA + CMHC + Province of BC = $19,560,391). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Five entities consolidated including Band Operations, Trust Fund, Capital Fund, Social Housing Fund, and Simpcw Holdings Limited.
